personality_one_liner: A clean, minimalist, pure-white educational AI workspace emphasizing typography, whitespace, and focused interactions with crisp Royal Blue accents.

spacing.rule: Generous padding around the chat stream. Input bar has comfortable breathing room. Max-width constraints on web for readability.

do's: Use solid white or #F0F4F9. The prompt explicitly requested 'Pure White background, Light Grey containers... No futuristic sci-fi grids'. Gemini uses opaque solid surfaces for its flat clean look.
dont's: Do not use blur or glassmorphism. Keep the pure minimal aesthetic requested.

screens.name: Auth & Onboarding

states.loading: Spinner centered on pure white screen.
states.error: Standard alert text above the action buttons.

screens.layout: Minimalist centered card layout on web, full screen on mobile. Pure white canvas. Input fields with #F0F4F9 background. Royal Blue primary button for Auth. Segmented control for Teacher/Student. Bottom sheet or dropdown for class picker.

screens.name: Main Chat App
screens.purpose: The core Gemini-style conversational interface with a sidebar and main chat area.

states.loading: Skeleton text lines for AI thinking state, left-aligned.
states.empty: Centered greeting with suggested educational prompts.
states.error: Inline error message below the failed AI generation block, with a retry button.

screens.layout: Desktop/Web: Two columns. Left sidebar (width ~280px) holds 'New Chat' button + Chat History list. Right main area is a pure white canvas centering a chat stream (max-width: 768px). Mobile: Sidebar becomes a slide-in drawer. Message Stream: User messages align right inside #F0F4F9 soft-rounded bubbles. TESS AI messages align left, no bubble, clean text directly on the white background. Below AI response: row with Thumbs Up/Down + TTS speaker icons. Input Area: Fixed to bottom. #F0F4F9 full-width pill container. Contains camera/image icon, mic icon, text input, and a solid Royal Blue circle send button. Changes to white background + subtle blue border on focus. Subtext below input: '✨ TESS AI can hallucinate. Cross-check with your Tesslcrum textbook PDF.'

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL COLOR OVERRIDE: The user explicitly requested Royal Blue accents. Use #2563EB for the primary brand color and send buttons. Do not substitute with grey/black.
Web/Responsive structure is paramount. Use `maxWidth: 768` or similar for the central chat stream. Build a responsive left sidebar that stays pinned on desktop and collapses into a Drawer on mobile.
Match the Gemini text-formatting rules: User bubbles are #F0F4F9 and right-aligned. AI messages have NO bounding box, are left-aligned on the pure white canvas.
Input bar active state: Default to #F0F4F9. On focus, transition to white (#FFFFFF) with a 1px solid blue border (#93C5FD or brandPrimary).
Input bar subtext must be placed underneath the input pill, centered or aligned left, in a very small grey font: '✨ TESS AI can hallucinate. Cross-check with your Tesslcrum textbook PDF.'
Ensure 'TESS AI' uses a highly readable, premium typographic hierarchy. No glassmorphism here, keep surfaces flat and minimal.
All action icons (thumbs up/down, TTS speaker) below the AI response should be small, outlined (Phosphor icons), and use a light grey/onSurfaceTertiary color.
